# EXECUTION-SPEC Frontmatter (Revision 3 — human review remediation)
# Generated by build-pipeline with lead-architect + expert consultation
# Rev 2: DA Team P0 + P1 findings. Rev 3: Human review — scope loss, derivation regression, artifact drift.

prd: PRD-052
prd_title: "Loyalty Operator Issuance — Pilot Reward Issue Workflow"
service: LoyaltyService
mvp_phase: 3  # Rewards

workstreams:
  WS1:
    name: RPC Role Gate Migration
    description: "Add role gate to rpc_issue_promo_coupon — currently any authenticated staff can issue entitlements (P0 security gap). Only pit_boss and admin allowed."
    executor: backend-service-builder
    executor_type: skill
    depends_on: []
    outputs:
      - supabase/migrations/YYYYMMDDHHMMSS_add_role_gate_rpc_issue_promo_coupon.sql
    gate: schema-validation
    estimated_complexity: low

  WS2:
    name: Service Layer Extensions + Contract Freeze
    description: "Add issueComp()/issueEntitlement() methods, FulfillmentPayload DTOs, issuance Zod schemas, SRM amendment. Merges old WS6 (contract freeze) into acceptance criteria."
    executor: backend-service-builder
    executor_type: skill
    depends_on: [WS1]
    outputs:
      - services/loyalty/dtos.ts  # Add IssueCompParams, CompIssuanceResult, FulfillmentPayload types
      - services/loyalty/schemas.ts  # Add issueRewardSchema
      - services/loyalty/crud.ts  # Add issueComp() function
      - services/loyalty/index.ts  # Add issueComp to interface + factory
      - services/loyalty/promo/dtos.ts  # Add IssueEntitlementParams, EntitlementIssuanceResult
      - services/loyalty/promo/crud.ts  # Add issueEntitlement() function
      - services/loyalty/promo/index.ts  # Add issueEntitlement to interface + factory
      - docs/20-architecture/SERVICE_RESPONSIBILITY_MATRIX.md  # SRM v4.20.0 amendment
    gate: type-check
    estimated_complexity: medium

  WS3:
    name: Unified Issuance API Route + Stub Wiring + Stub Dispositions
    description: "Create POST /api/v1/loyalty/issue with role-gated family dispatch; wire GET /loyalty/balances stub; verify GET /players/[id]/loyalty; change POST /loyalty/mid-session-reward to 501; update mid-session test"
    executor: api-builder
    executor_type: skill
    depends_on: [WS2]
    outputs:
      - app/api/v1/loyalty/issue/route.ts  # NEW unified issuance endpoint
      - app/api/v1/loyalty/balances/route.ts  # WIRE stub to LoyaltyService.getBalance (FR-11)
      - app/api/v1/loyalty/mid-session-reward/route.ts  # MODIFY to 501
      - app/api/v1/loyalty/mid-session-reward/__tests__/route.test.ts  # UPDATE to expect 501
    gate: type-check
    estimated_complexity: medium

  WS4:
    name: Issuance UI — Drawer + Panels
    description: "Build IssueRewardDrawer with family-aware confirm panels, useIssueReward hook, enable IssueRewardButton, delete ManualRewardDialog"
    executor: frontend-design-pt-2
    executor_type: skill
    depends_on: [WS3]
    outputs:
      - components/loyalty/issue-reward-drawer.tsx  # NEW unified drawer
      - components/loyalty/reward-selector.tsx  # NEW catalog list + cards
      - components/loyalty/comp-confirm-panel.tsx  # NEW comp confirm
      - components/loyalty/entitlement-confirm-panel.tsx  # NEW entitlement confirm
      - components/loyalty/issuance-result-panel.tsx  # NEW result panel
      - hooks/loyalty/use-issue-reward.ts  # NEW mutation hook
      - components/player-360/header/issue-reward-button.tsx  # MODIFY enable + wire
      - components/loyalty/manual-reward-dialog.tsx  # DELETE
    gate: type-check
    estimated_complexity: high

  WS5:
    name: History Extension + Mapper Bug Fix
    description: "Extend RewardsHistoryList with comp filter chip; fix pre-existing mapper bug ('redemption' → 'redeem'); merge promo_coupon entries"
    executor: frontend-design-pt-2
    executor_type: skill
    depends_on: [WS2]
    outputs:
      - components/player-360/rewards/rewards-history-list.tsx  # MODIFY add comp filter
      - services/player360-dashboard/crud.ts  # MODIFY getRewardHistory to include promo_coupon
      - services/player360-dashboard/mappers.ts  # FIX 'redemption' → 'redeem' + add promo_coupon mapping
    gate: type-check
    estimated_complexity: low

  WS6:
    name: Integration, Route Handler & Unit Tests
    description: "Backend integration tests, route handler test for /issue, UI unit test for IssueRewardDrawer, history mapper test"
    executor: backend-service-builder
    executor_type: skill
    depends_on: [WS3, WS4, WS5]
    outputs:
      - services/loyalty/__tests__/issue-comp.int.test.ts
      - services/loyalty/__tests__/issue-entitlement.int.test.ts
      - services/loyalty/__tests__/issuance-idempotency.int.test.ts
      - app/api/v1/loyalty/issue/__tests__/route.test.ts  # NEW route handler test
      - components/loyalty/__tests__/issue-reward-drawer.test.tsx  # NEW UI unit test
      - services/player360-dashboard/__tests__/mappers.test.ts  # UPDATE for comp mapping
    gate: test-pass
    estimated_complexity: high

execution_phases:
  - name: "Phase 1 — Migration"
    parallel: [WS1]
    gates: [schema-validation]

  - name: "Phase 2 — Service Layer"
    parallel: [WS2]
    gates: [type-check]

  - name: "Phase 3 — API + History"
    parallel: [WS3, WS5]
    gates: [type-check]

  - name: "Phase 4 — Issuance UI"
    parallel: [WS4]
    gates: [type-check, lint]

  - name: "Phase 5 — Tests"
    parallel: [WS6]
    gates: [test-pass, lint]

gates:
  schema-validation:
    command: "npm run db:types-local 2>&1 | tail -5"
    success_criteria: "Exit code 0, types regenerated"

  type-check:
    command: "npm run type-check 2>&1 | tail -5"
    success_criteria: "Exit code 0"

  lint:
    command: "npm run lint -- --quiet 2>&1 | tail -5"
    success_criteria: "Exit code 0, no errors"

  test-pass:
    command: "npm test -- --testPathPattern='(services/loyalty/__tests__/issue|loyalty/issue/|issue-reward-drawer|player360-dashboard/__tests__/mapper)' --silent 2>&1 | tail -10"
    success_criteria: "All tests pass"

external_dependencies:
  - prd: Vector-A
    service: RewardService (catalog)
    required_for: "Catalog must have active rewards for drawer to display options"

risks:
  - risk: "Vector A catalog may not be populated when Vector B ships"
    mitigation: "Drawer shows empty state gracefully; feature is inert without catalog data"
  - risk: "Entitlement params from catalog may not match eventual one-click RPC"
    mitigation: "IssueEntitlementParams interface is the abstraction boundary; swap resolution internally"
  - risk: "Reward catalog validation is UX-only — rpc_redeem does not validate p_reward_id"
    mitigation: "Accepted for single-casino pilot. p_reward_id is metadata, not a control parameter. Hardening for multi-property requires moving validation into the RPC."
---

# EXECUTION-SPEC: PRD-052 — Loyalty Operator Issuance (Revision 2)

## Overview

Enables pit bosses to issue pilot rewards (comps and entitlements) to players from the Player 360 context through a unified issue drawer. This is Phase B of the Loyalty Pilot Slice Boundary.

**Key insight**: The backend infrastructure is ~90% complete. All tables, RLS policies, and most service methods exist. One critical security gap (`rpc_issue_promo_coupon` missing role gate) requires a migration. Beyond that, this EXEC-SPEC adds thin wiring layers on top of proven infrastructure.

**Authorized issuer roles**: `pit_boss` and `admin` ONLY. Cashier cannot issue comps or entitlements.

## Scope

- **In Scope**: Role gate migration, unified issuance drawer, `issueComp()`/`issueEntitlement()` service methods, unified `/issue` endpoint, history extension, fulfillment contract freeze, ManualRewardDialog deletion, SRM amendment
- **Out of Scope**: Admin catalog CRUD (Vector A), print templates (Vector C), mid-session auto-trigger, multi-property issuance

## Architecture Context

- **SRM**: LoyaltyService owns `loyalty_ledger`, `player_loyalty`, `promo_coupon`, `reward_catalog` (operationally, SRM amendment in WS2)
- **RPCs**: `rpc_redeem` (comp), `rpc_issue_promo_coupon` (entitlement) — both ADR-040 compliant
- **RLS**: ADR-015 Pattern C, ADR-024 authoritative context derivation
- **Surface**: Client Shell rendering, Client-side Fetch data aggregation (ADR-041 §6.1 of PRD)

## DA Team Findings Addressed (Revision 2)

| Finding | Severity | Resolution |
|---------|----------|------------|
| `rpc_issue_promo_coupon` no role gate | P0 | WS1: New migration adds role gate (pit_boss, admin only) |
| `IssueCompParams` missing `note` field | P1 | WS2: Add `note?: string`, default to `"Comp: {rewardName}"` |
| Cashier role exclusion (user correction) | P1 | All: Only pit_boss + admin can issue. Route handler enforces before dispatch. |
| `LOYALTY_CATALOG_CONFIG_INVALID` missing | P1 | WS3: Added to error mapping (400) |
| `issueComp()` vs `redeem()` ambiguity | P1 | WS2: Clarified — `issueComp()` calls `rpc_redeem` directly, `redeem()` is ad-hoc |
| SRM missing reward catalog tables | P1 | WS2: SRM v4.20.0 amendment included |
| `promo_program_id` resolution undefined | P1 | WS2: Query `promo_program` by casino + instrument_type |
| Phantom hook `useRewardCatalog` | P1 | WS4: Fixed to `useRewards({ isActive: true })` |
| Error code taxonomy mismatch | P1 | WS3: Service throws DomainError codes; route maps to LOYALTY_-prefixed response codes |
| WS5 missing UI test | P1 | WS6: Added `issue-reward-drawer.test.tsx` |
| No route handler test for /issue | P1 | WS6: Added `route.test.ts` |
| Mid-session test regression | P1 | WS3: Updates existing test to expect 501 |
| `issueComp()` query waterfall | P1 | WS2: `Promise.all` for parallel catalog + price_points + balance fetch |
| `issueEntitlement()` query waterfall | P1 | WS2: Use existing `getReward(rewardId)` for single-call fetch with children |
| Mapper bug: 'redemption' vs 'redeem' | P1 | WS5: Fix pre-existing bug in `mapToRewardHistoryItem` |
| WS6 over-scoped | P2 | Collapsed into WS2 acceptance criteria |
| WS4 zero test coverage | P2 | WS6: Added mapper test update |
| `@jest-environment node` missing | P2 | WS6: All int tests require `/** @jest-environment node */` pragma |
| Over-fetch-and-merge strategy | P2 | WS5: Documented — fetch `limit` per source, merge, sort, truncate |
| Dual-service instantiation | P2 | WS3: Documented — route creates both services |
| Reward catalog validation UX-only | P1 | Risks section: Documented as accepted pilot gap |
| NFR-4 concurrent test infeasible | P2 | WS6: Rewritten as `Promise.all` idempotency test |

**Human Review Findings (Revision 3):**

| Finding | Severity | Resolution |
|---------|----------|------------|
| GET /loyalty/balances and GET /players/[id]/loyalty dropped from scope | P0 | WS3: Added balances stub wiring + player loyalty verification |
| `issueEntitlement()` reintroduces tier derivation PRD forbids | P0 | WS2: Removed tier lookup; uses frozen catalog/config values only |
| PRD still says cashier can issue; spec says pit_boss+admin | P1 | PRD amended in worktree (uncommitted): cashier excluded from issuer roles. Verify PRD is committed alongside this spec. |
| PRD says `reason='redemption'` but DB uses `reason='redeem'` | P2 | PRD amended in worktree (uncommitted): corrected to `reason='redeem'`. Verify PRD is committed alongside this spec. |
| Lint gate defined but never used in execution phases | P2 | Added lint gate to Phase 4 + Phase 5 |

---

## Workstream Details

### WS1: RPC Role Gate Migration

**Purpose**: Fix P0 security gap — `rpc_issue_promo_coupon` currently has no role gate. Any authenticated staff can issue entitlements.

**Bounded Context**: LoyaltyService (database)

**Deliverables**:

1. **NEW migration** `YYYYMMDDHHMMSS_add_role_gate_rpc_issue_promo_coupon.sql`:
   - `CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION` that adds role check after context extraction
   - After `PERFORM set_rls_context_from_staff(...)`:
     ```sql
     v_caller_role := NULLIF(current_setting('app.staff_role', true), '');
     IF v_caller_role IS NULL OR v_caller_role NOT IN ('pit_boss', 'admin') THEN
       RAISE EXCEPTION 'FORBIDDEN: Role % cannot issue promo coupons', COALESCE(v_caller_role, 'unknown')
         USING ERRCODE = 'P0001';
     END IF;
     ```
   - **Note**: `cashier` deliberately excluded per SEC-002 ("No promo access") and user confirmation
   - Run `npm run db:types-local` after migration

**Patterns Applied**:
- ADR-018: SECURITY DEFINER governance — role gate inside RPC
- ADR-024: Role derived from `app.staff_role` (authoritative context)
- Follows `rpc_redeem` precedent (line 81 of migration `20260307114447`)

**Acceptance Criteria**:
- [ ] Migration applies cleanly
- [ ] `npm run db:types-local` succeeds
- [ ] Calling `rpc_issue_promo_coupon` as `dealer` raises FORBIDDEN
- [ ] Calling as `cashier` raises FORBIDDEN
- [ ] Calling as `pit_boss` succeeds
- [ ] Calling as `admin` succeeds

---

### WS2: Service Layer Extensions + Contract Freeze

**Purpose**: Add issuance service methods, DTOs, fulfillment contract types, and SRM amendment. Contract freeze verification (old WS6) is absorbed into acceptance criteria.

**Bounded Context**: LoyaltyService + PromoService (Reward Context)
**Pattern**: Pattern A (Contract-First Manual DTOs)

**Deliverables**:

1. **New DTOs in `services/loyalty/dtos.ts`**:
   - `IssueCompParams` — `{ playerId: string; rewardId: string; visitId?: string; idempotencyKey: string; note?: string }` (note defaults to `"Comp: {rewardName}"` in issueComp)
   - `CompIssuanceResult` — extends rpc_redeem output with catalog context: `{ ledgerId, pointsDebited, balanceBefore, balanceAfter, rewardId, rewardCode, rewardName, faceValueCents, isExisting, issuedAt }`
   - `CompFulfillmentPayload` — frozen Vector C contract per PRD §8.1
   - `EntitlementFulfillmentPayload` — frozen Vector C contract per PRD §8.1
   - `FulfillmentPayload = CompFulfillmentPayload | EntitlementFulfillmentPayload`
   - `IssuanceResultDTO` — discriminated union with `family` field: `CompIssuanceResult | EntitlementIssuanceResult` (each has `family: RewardFamily`)

2. **New DTOs in `services/loyalty/promo/dtos.ts`**:
   - `IssueEntitlementParams` — `{ playerId: string; rewardId: string; visitId?: string; idempotencyKey: string }`
   - `EntitlementIssuanceResult` — extends rpc_issue_promo_coupon output: `{ couponId, validationNumber, faceValueCents, matchWagerCents, status, expiresAt, rewardId, rewardCode, rewardName, isExisting, issuedAt }`

3. **New Zod schema in `services/loyalty/schemas.ts`**:
   - `issueRewardSchema` — validates `{ player_id: uuid, reward_id: uuid, visit_id?: uuid, idempotency_key: uuid }`

4. **New method in `services/loyalty/crud.ts`** — `issueComp()`:
   - **Relationship to `redeem()`**: `issueComp()` is a catalog-backed orchestration that calls `rpc_redeem` DIRECTLY (not via `redeem()`). The existing `redeem()` remains for non-catalog ad-hoc redemptions (manual adjustments). Invariant: catalog-backed issuance always uses `issueComp()`, never `redeem()`.
   - Flow:
     1. `Promise.all([getReward(rewardId), getBalance(playerId, casinoId)])` — parallel fetch (addresses R5 waterfall finding)
     2. Validate: reward exists, `is_active`, `family === 'points_comp'`
     3. Extract `pointsCost` from `reward.pricePoints`
     4. Advisory balance pre-check (UX only — comment: `// Advisory only — RPC is authoritative. See PRD §5.3.`)
     5. Default note: `params.note ?? "Comp: ${reward.name}"`
     6. Call `rpc_redeem` with `p_player_id`, `p_points: pointsCost`, `p_note`, `p_idempotency_key`, `p_reward_id`, `p_reference: "reward_catalog:{rewardId}:{rewardCode}"`
     7. Map result with catalog context → `CompIssuanceResult`
   - Throws: `LOYALTY_REWARD_NOT_FOUND`, `LOYALTY_REWARD_INACTIVE`, `LOYALTY_REWARD_FAMILY_MISMATCH`, `LOYALTY_INSUFFICIENT_BALANCE`

5. **New method in `services/loyalty/promo/crud.ts`** — `issueEntitlement()`:
   - **NO tier derivation.** Per PRD §7.3: "Vector B does not implement entitlement derivation logic. It only issues entitlements whose required issue-time commercial values (face value, match wager) are already resolvable from frozen active catalog/config inputs. There is no tier-to-entitlement lookup, no policy evaluation, and no auto-derivation of commercial parameters from player state."
   - Flow:
     1. Use existing `getReward(rewardId)` which fetches reward + ALL child records in parallel (addresses R5 waterfall finding)
     2. Validate: reward exists, `is_active`, `family === 'entitlement'`
     3. Read frozen commercial values from `reward.metadata` (JSONB): `face_value_cents`, `instrument_type`, `match_wager_cents`. These are catalog-authored values, not derived from player tier. If any required field is missing, throw `LOYALTY_CATALOG_CONFIG_INVALID`.
     4. **Resolve `promo_program_id`**: Query `promo_program` table for `casino_id` + `is_active = true` + matching program type. If no active program found, throw `LOYALTY_CATALOG_CONFIG_INVALID`.
     5. Generate `validation_number` as UUID v4
     6. Call `rpc_issue_promo_coupon` with resolved params (face_value from catalog, NOT from tier lookup)
     7. Map result with catalog context → `EntitlementIssuanceResult`
   - Throws: `LOYALTY_REWARD_NOT_FOUND`, `LOYALTY_REWARD_INACTIVE`, `LOYALTY_REWARD_FAMILY_MISMATCH`, `LOYALTY_CATALOG_CONFIG_INVALID`
   - **Upgrade path**: When Vector A resolves GAP-A5 and tier-to-entitlement mapping exists, this method swaps its resolution strategy internally. Callers and API contract unchanged.

6. **Update interfaces** in `services/loyalty/index.ts` and `services/loyalty/promo/index.ts`

7. **SRM v4.20.0 amendment** in `docs/20-architecture/SERVICE_RESPONSIBILITY_MATRIX.md`:
   - Add `reward_catalog`, `reward_price_points`, `reward_entitlement_tier`, `reward_limits`, `reward_eligibility`, `loyalty_earn_config` to LoyaltyService `Owns:` row
   - Register `Player360DashboardService` as read-only aggregation service (follows `PlayerTimelineService` precedent)

**Patterns Applied**:
- ADR-024: No spoofable params — casino_id derived from RLS context
- ADR-040: Identity provenance — actor_id from context, not parameter
- PRD §5.3: Service validates for UX; RPC is hard enforcement boundary
- NFR-5: Validation number generated as UUID v4 (non-predictable)
- NFR-6: Face value / match wager read from catalog, not from client input
- `Promise.all` for parallel pre-flight queries (R5 waterfall fix)

**Acceptance Criteria**:
- [ ] `npm run type-check` passes
- [ ] DTOs follow Pattern A (manual interfaces, camelCase)
- [ ] No `as any` or `console.*`
- [ ] FulfillmentPayload types match PRD §8.1 exactly (contract freeze)
- [ ] `FulfillmentPayload` importable: `import { FulfillmentPayload } from '@/services/loyalty'`
- [ ] Service methods are in functional factory (not class)
- [ ] `issueComp` calls `rpc_redeem` directly (not via `redeem()`)
- [ ] `issueComp` derives `p_note` automatically if not provided
- [ ] `issueComp` uses `Promise.all` for parallel pre-flight queries
- [ ] `issueEntitlement` uses `getReward()` for single-call fetch with children
- [ ] `issueEntitlement` resolves `promo_program_id` by querying `promo_program` table
- [ ] SRM updated to v4.20.0 with reward catalog tables

---

### WS3: Unified Issuance API Route + Stub Dispositions

**Purpose**: Create the unified issuance endpoint with role-gated family dispatch, and change mid-session-reward to 501.

**Bounded Context**: LoyaltyService (HTTP boundary)

**Deliverables**:

1. **NEW `app/api/v1/loyalty/issue/route.ts`**:
   - `export const dynamic = 'force-dynamic'`
   - POST handler with `createRequestContext`, `requireIdempotencyKey`, `withServerAction`
   - Validate request body with `issueRewardSchema` from WS2
   - **Role gate at route level** (defense-in-depth): check `ctx.rlsContext.staffRole` before dispatch
     - Both families: only `pit_boss` and `admin` allowed
     - Any other role → 403 `LOYALTY_UNAUTHORIZED`
   - Fetch reward from catalog to resolve `reward_family` (uses caller's RLS context, not service_role)
   - **Dual-service instantiation**: create both `createLoyaltyService(supabase)` and `createPromoService(supabase)`, dispatch by family
   - Route to `issueComp()` or `issueEntitlement()` based on family
   - Return `ServiceHttpResult<IssuanceResultDTO>`
   - Structured logging: `{ action: 'reward_issued', family, reward_id, player_id }`
   - **Error mapping** — service layer throws DomainError codes; route maps to LOYALTY_-prefixed response codes:
     - `INSUFFICIENT_BALANCE` → 400 `LOYALTY_INSUFFICIENT_BALANCE`
     - `REWARD_INACTIVE` → 400 `LOYALTY_REWARD_INACTIVE`
     - `NOT_FOUND` (reward) → 404 `LOYALTY_REWARD_NOT_FOUND`
     - `FORBIDDEN` → 403 `LOYALTY_UNAUTHORIZED`
     - `CATALOG_CONFIG_INVALID` → 400 `LOYALTY_CATALOG_CONFIG_INVALID`
     - `IDEMPOTENCY_CONFLICT` → 200 `LOYALTY_IDEMPOTENCY_HIT` (successful response with `is_existing: true`)
     - Assembly failure → 500 `LOYALTY_FULFILLMENT_ASSEMBLY_FAILED`

2. **WIRE `app/api/v1/loyalty/balances/route.ts`** (FR-11):
   - Currently a stub: `void supabase; void query; return successResponse(ctx, null)`
   - Wire to `LoyaltyService.getBalance(playerId, casinoId)` via `withServerAction`
   - Return `ServiceHttpResult<PlayerLoyaltyDTO>`
   - Follow the existing pattern from `GET /api/v1/players/[playerId]/loyalty` (already wired)

3. **VERIFY `GET /api/v1/players/[playerId]/loyalty`** (FR-12):
   - Already wired to `LoyaltyService.getBalance()` — no code changes needed
   - Verification: run existing test at `app/api/v1/players/[playerId]/loyalty/__tests__/`
   - This is a gate-time verification, not an output artifact

4. **MODIFY `app/api/v1/loyalty/mid-session-reward/route.ts`**:
   - Replace current implementation with explicit 501 response
   - Return `ServiceHttpResult` with `code: 'LOYALTY_NOT_IMPLEMENTED'`, `status: 501`
   - Add comment citing PRD §7.4 (D6 scope change: GAP-B5 divergence)

3. **UPDATE `app/api/v1/loyalty/mid-session-reward/__tests__/route.test.ts`**:
   - Change expected status from 200 to 501
   - Update assertions to match new 501 response shape

**Patterns Applied**:
- `withServerAction` middleware for auth/RLS/audit
- `requireIdempotencyKey` for POST (standard pattern)
- `ServiceHttpResult<T>` response envelope
- ADR-024: Casino context from auth middleware, not request body
- Defense-in-depth: role check at route AND RPC level

**Acceptance Criteria**:
- [ ] `npm run type-check` passes
- [ ] `POST /api/v1/loyalty/issue` accepts `{ player_id, reward_id, visit_id?, idempotency_key }`
- [ ] Idempotency-Key header required
- [ ] Family resolved server-side (not from client)
- [ ] Route rejects non-pit_boss/admin roles with 403 BEFORE dispatching to service
- [ ] All error codes mapped (DomainError → LOYALTY_-prefixed)
- [ ] `GET /loyalty/balances` returns real data from LoyaltyService.getBalance (FR-11)
- [ ] `GET /players/[id]/loyalty` verified working (FR-12)
- [ ] Mid-session-reward returns 501
- [ ] Mid-session-reward existing test updated and passes
- [ ] No `as any` or `console.*`

---

### WS4: Issuance UI — Drawer + Panels

**Purpose**: Build the unified issue reward drawer with family-aware confirm panels and mutation hook.

**Bounded Context**: Player360 UI (consumes LoyaltyService DTOs)

**Surface Classification** (ADR-041, from PRD §6.1):
- Rendering Delivery: **Client Shell** (interactive mutation-heavy drawer)
- Data Aggregation: **Client-side Fetch** (TanStack Query)
- Rejected: RSC Prefetch (insufficient value for click-triggered drawer), BFF RPC (no benefit)
- Metric Provenance: No new truth-bearing metrics

**Deliverables**:

1. **NEW `components/loyalty/issue-reward-drawer.tsx`** — main drawer (shadcn Sheet):
   - Props: `{ playerId, playerName, casinoName, currentBalance, currentTier, staffName, open, onOpenChange, onFulfillmentReady? }`
   - `casinoName` sourced from Player360 context (already available in Player360Header)
   - Internal state machine: `'select' | 'confirm' | 'result'`
   - Key-based reset: `<DrawerContent key={open ? 'open' : 'closed'} />` to reset state on reopen
   - Renders RewardSelector → family-specific confirm panel → IssuanceResultPanel
   - Calls `useIssueReward()` mutation on confirm

2. **NEW `components/loyalty/reward-selector.tsx`**:
   - Uses `useRewards({ isActive: true })` from `hooks/loyalty/use-reward-catalog.ts` (NOT `useRewardCatalog` — that doesn't exist)
   - Casino scoping is automatic via RLS context (no `casinoId` parameter needed)
   - Groups rewards by family with section headers
   - Each reward card shows: name, description, family badge, points cost (comp) or configured face value + instrument type (entitlement)
   - Empty state when no catalog rewards configured

3. **NEW `components/loyalty/comp-confirm-panel.tsx`**:
   - Displays: reward name, face value, points cost, current balance, post-debit balance
   - Insufficient balance warning (non-blocking — advisory only)

4. **NEW `components/loyalty/entitlement-confirm-panel.tsx`**:
   - Displays: reward name, face value (from catalog config), match wager (from catalog config)
   - Note: values are from catalog, not auto-derived from tier

5. **NEW `components/loyalty/issuance-result-panel.tsx`**:
   - Success: details + "Print" button binding point (no-op until Vector C)
   - Failure: error message with actionable feedback per LOYALTY_-prefixed error codes
   - Duplicate: "Already issued today" with existing coupon details (when `isExisting: true`)
   - Fires `onFulfillmentReady(payload)` on success (no-op callback until Vector C binds)

6. **NEW `hooks/loyalty/use-issue-reward.ts`**:
   - `useIssueReward()` mutation calling `POST /api/v1/loyalty/issue`
   - Generates `idempotency_key` as UUID v4 on each mutation call
   - Uses `useTransition` for non-blocking mutation (React 19 pattern)
   - On success: invalidates queries using key factories from `loyaltyKeys` (`loyaltyKeys.balance()`, `loyaltyKeys.ledger()`) and `player360DashboardKeys` (reward history)
   - Returns typed `IssuanceResultDTO` (discriminated by `family` field)

7. **MODIFY `components/player-360/header/issue-reward-button.tsx`**:
   - Change `enabled` default to `true`
   - Wire `onClick` to open `IssueRewardDrawer`
   - Update tooltip: "Issue a reward to this player"

8. **DELETE `components/loyalty/manual-reward-dialog.tsx`**:
   - Remove file and all CODE imports across codebase
   - Grep for `ManualRewardDialog` in `.ts`/`.tsx` files and clean up
   - Do NOT rewrite docs references (investigation/posture files)

**React 19 Patterns**:
- `useTransition` for issuance mutation (non-blocking UI)
- Key-based reset for drawer state on reopen
- No `useEffect` sync patterns
- No manual loading state (`useState(false)` for `isSaving`)

**Acceptance Criteria**:
- [ ] `npm run type-check` passes
- [ ] Drawer opens from IssueRewardButton click
- [ ] Uses `useRewards({ isActive: true })` (NOT phantom `useRewardCatalog`)
- [ ] Reward catalog displayed grouped by family
- [ ] Comp confirm shows balance preview
- [ ] Entitlement confirm shows catalog-derived values
- [ ] Result panel shows success/failure/duplicate
- [ ] `onFulfillmentReady` fires on success (no-op callback)
- [ ] ManualRewardDialog deleted with no dangling code imports
- [ ] No `useEffect` sync, no manual loading states
- [ ] `useTransition` used for mutation
- [ ] Idempotency key generated as UUID v4 per mutation call

---

### WS5: History Extension + Mapper Bug Fix

**Purpose**: Extend RewardsHistoryList to include comp entries, add "Comp" filter chip, and fix pre-existing mapper bug.

**Bounded Context**: Player360 UI + Player360DashboardService

**Deliverables**:

1. **MODIFY `components/player-360/rewards/rewards-history-list.tsx`**:
   - Add `'comp'` to `FilterType`: `'all' | 'matchplay' | 'freeplay' | 'comp'`
   - Add `{ value: 'comp', label: 'Comp' }` to `filterOptions`

2. **MODIFY `services/player360-dashboard/crud.ts`** (`getRewardHistory`):
   - Current: queries `loyalty_ledger` for `reason = 'redeem'` only
   - Extension: also query `promo_coupon` for player's coupons (entitlement entries)
   - **Over-fetch-and-merge strategy**: fetch `limit` items from EACH source, merge into single array, sort by `issued_at DESC`, truncate to `limit`. This is correct for MVP "top-N" display. Comment: `// MVP: over-fetch-and-merge. Cursor pagination across sources deferred.`
   - Map comp entries: `rewardType = 'comp'`, `amount = abs(points_delta)`
   - Map entitlement entries: `rewardType = 'matchplay' | 'freeplay'` based on `promo_type`

3. **FIX `services/player360-dashboard/mappers.ts`** (`mapToRewardHistoryItem`):
   - **Pre-existing bug (R5 finding)**: Line 433 checks `entry_type === 'redemption'` but the actual `loyalty_ledger.reason` value is `'redeem'`. This causes all comps to render as `rewardType: 'other'`, making the new "Comp" filter chip inert.
   - Fix: change `entry_type === 'redemption'` to `entry_type === 'redeem'`
   - Add new mapping function for promo_coupon source shape

**Acceptance Criteria**:
- [ ] `npm run type-check` passes
- [ ] "Comp" filter chip visible alongside All/Match Play/Free Play
- [ ] Comp entries from loyalty_ledger appear with `rewardType = 'comp'` (not 'other')
- [ ] Entitlement entries from promo_coupon appear in history
- [ ] Sort order: issued_at DESC across both sources
- [ ] Filter correctly isolates each family
- [ ] Over-fetch-and-merge documented with code comment

---

### WS6: Integration, Route Handler & Unit Tests

**Purpose**: Comprehensive test coverage for all issuance paths — backend integration, route handler, UI component, and history mapper.

**Bounded Context**: LoyaltyService + UI (cross-cutting)

**Deliverables**:

1. **NEW `services/loyalty/__tests__/issue-comp.int.test.ts`**:
   - `/** @jest-environment node */` pragma (ADR-044 §4)
   - Guard: `describe.skipIf(!process.env.SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY)(...)`
   - Happy path: issue comp → verify ledger debit + balance update
   - Insufficient balance: verify `LOYALTY_INSUFFICIENT_BALANCE` error
   - Inactive reward: verify `LOYALTY_REWARD_INACTIVE` error
   - Server-side validation: `issueComp` with non-existent reward → `LOYALTY_REWARD_NOT_FOUND`

2. **NEW `services/loyalty/__tests__/issue-entitlement.int.test.ts`**:
   - `/** @jest-environment node */` pragma
   - Happy path: issue entitlement → verify promo_coupon created
   - Catalog config invalid: missing commercial params in reward metadata (face_value_cents, instrument_type) → `LOYALTY_CATALOG_CONFIG_INVALID`
   - Role gate: authenticate as `dealer`, call `rpc_issue_promo_coupon` → FORBIDDEN (validates WS1 migration)
   - Role gate: authenticate as `cashier`, call `rpc_issue_promo_coupon` → FORBIDDEN

3. **NEW `services/loyalty/__tests__/issuance-idempotency.int.test.ts`**:
   - `/** @jest-environment node */` pragma
   - Comp idempotency: duplicate key → returns existing with `isExisting: true` + fulfillment-complete payload
   - Entitlement idempotency: duplicate key → returns existing coupon
   - Concurrent double-debit test (NFR-4): Send two `rpc_redeem` calls with same `p_idempotency_key` via `Promise.all`; assert only one debit occurs and second returns `is_existing: true`

4. **NEW `app/api/v1/loyalty/issue/__tests__/route.test.ts`**:
   - Success path: POST with valid payload → 200 + IssuanceResultDTO
   - Validation error: missing player_id → 400
   - Missing Idempotency-Key header → 400
   - Role rejection: non-pit_boss/admin → 403
   - Reward not found → 404

5. **NEW `components/loyalty/__tests__/issue-reward-drawer.test.tsx`**:
   - Renders in 'select' state with reward list
   - Switches to comp confirm panel on points_comp selection
   - Switches to entitlement confirm panel on entitlement selection
   - Shows result panel after mutation
   - Shows error state on failure

6. **UPDATE `services/player360-dashboard/__tests__/mappers.test.ts`**:
   - Add test case: `reason = 'redeem'` maps to `rewardType = 'comp'` (validates WS5 bug fix)
   - Add test case: promo_coupon source maps to `matchplay`/`freeplay`

**Test Environment**: All `*.int.test.ts` files require `/** @jest-environment node */` pragma at top of file.

**Acceptance Criteria**:
- [ ] All tests pass with broadened gate pattern
- [ ] Comp happy path verified
- [ ] Entitlement happy path verified
- [ ] Insufficient balance rejection verified
- [ ] Idempotency verified (duplicate returns existing, fulfillment-complete)
- [ ] Role gate verified (dealer → FORBIDDEN, cashier → FORBIDDEN)
- [ ] Route handler test covers success + error paths
- [ ] UI test covers all drawer states
- [ ] Mapper test confirms 'redeem' → 'comp' mapping

---

## Definition of Done

### Functionality
- [ ] Pit boss can issue `points_comp` from Player 360 unified drawer
- [ ] Pit boss can issue `entitlement` from Player 360 unified drawer
- [ ] Insufficient balance shows clear error before commit
- [ ] Duplicate entitlement returns existing coupon with feedback
- [ ] Inactive rewards excluded from catalog list
- [ ] RewardsHistoryList shows both families with filter chips
- [ ] `GET /loyalty/balances` returns real data (FR-11)
- [ ] `GET /players/[id]/loyalty` returns real data (FR-12)
- [ ] `POST /loyalty/mid-session-reward` returns 501

### Data & Integrity
- [ ] Comp issuance produces ledger debit + balance update atomically (via rpc_redeem)
- [ ] Entitlement issuance produces promo_coupon + outbox entry atomically (via rpc_issue_promo_coupon)
- [ ] Idempotency keys prevent duplicate financial impact

### Security
- [ ] `rpc_issue_promo_coupon` enforces role gate (pit_boss, admin only) — WS1 migration
- [ ] Unified `/issue` route rejects non-pit_boss/admin before dispatch
- [ ] All paths use `set_rls_context_from_staff()` (ADR-024)
- [ ] Casino scoping enforced — no cross-casino issuance
- [ ] Cashier cannot issue comps or entitlements

### Testing
- [ ] Integration test: comp issuance happy path
- [ ] Integration test: entitlement issuance happy path
- [ ] Integration test: insufficient balance rejection
- [ ] Integration test: idempotency (duplicate → existing with fulfillment payload)
- [ ] Integration test: role gate (dealer + cashier → FORBIDDEN)
- [ ] Route handler test: success + validation + role rejection
- [ ] UI test: IssueRewardDrawer render states
- [ ] Mapper test: 'redeem' → 'comp' mapping

### Contract Surface
- [ ] FulfillmentPayload types exported from `services/loyalty/dtos.ts`
- [ ] onFulfillmentReady callback wired in drawer (no-op)
- [ ] ManualRewardDialog deleted

### Governance
- [ ] SRM updated to v4.20.0 (reward catalog tables + Player360DashboardService)
